records.question: What people without a position teach courses that are exactly Level_300?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtby.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.hasposition = '0' AND course.courselevel = 'Level_300'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.p_id
FROM person
JOIN taughtBy ON person.p_id = taughtBy.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtBy.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.hasPosition = '0'
  AND course.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

records.question: Which people are professors with a value of at least 1, are not students, have no position, have zero years in the program, where inphase is 0, and who teach Level_300 courses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtby.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.professor >= 1 AND person.inphase = '0' AND course.courselevel = 'Level_300' AND person.student = 0 AND person.hasposition = '0' AND person.yearsinprogram = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.p_id
FROM person
JOIN taughtBy ON person.p_id = taughtBy.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtBy.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.professor >= 1
  AND person.inPhase = '0'
  AND person.student = '0'
  AND person.hasPosition = '0'
  AND person.yearsInProgram = '0'
  AND course.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

records.question: Which people are in Year_9 of the program, have at most 1 student role, at most 0 professor role, are exactly in the Post_Generals phase, and have position exactly 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
WHERE person.yearsinprogram = 'Year_9' AND person.student <= 1 AND person.professor <= 0 AND person.inphase = 'Post_Generals' AND person.hasposition = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p_id
FROM person
WHERE yearsInProgram = 'Year_9'
  AND student <= 1
  AND professor <= 0
  AND inPhase = 'Post_Generals'
  AND hasPosition = '0'

records.question: Which people hold the position Faculty_eme and have a professor rating of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
WHERE person.hasposition = 'Faculty_eme' AND person.professor >= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT person.p_id
FROM person
WHERE hasPosition = 'Faculty_eme'
  AND professor >= 1
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM taughtBy WHERE taughtBy.p_id = person.p_id
  )

records.question: Which people are in Year_12 of the program?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
WHERE person.yearsinprogram = 'Year_12'
records.pred_sql: SELECT p_id FROM person WHERE yearsInProgram = 'Year_12'

records.question: Which people have no position and have been in the program exactly as Year_10?

WHERE person.hasposition = '0' AND person.yearsinprogram = 'Year_10'
records.pred_sql: SELECT p_id FROM person WHERE hasPosition = '0' AND yearsInProgram = 'Year_10'

records.question: Which faculty members with exactly 0 years in the program, who are not students and have a professor rating of at least 1, teach courses at Level_300?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtby.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.yearsinprogram = '0' AND person.hasposition = 'Faculty' AND person.professor >= 1 AND person.student = 0 AND course.courselevel = 'Level_300'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT person.p_id
FROM person
JOIN taughtBy ON person.p_id = taughtBy.p_id
JOIN course ON taughtBy.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE person.yearsInProgram = '0'
  AND person.hasPosition = 'Faculty'
  AND person.professor >= 1
  AND person.student = 0
  AND course.courseLevel = 'Level_300'

records.question: Which students are in Year_12 and currently in the Post_Generals phase but do not hold any position?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
WHERE person.yearsinprogram = 'Year_12' AND person.inphase = 'Post_Generals' AND person.student = 1 AND person.hasposition = '0'
records.pred_sql: SELECT p_id FROM person WHERE yearsInProgram = 'Year_12' AND inPhase = 'Post_Generals' AND student = 1 AND hasPosition = 0

records.question: Which faculty-affiliated people are not students, have been in the program for exactly 0 years, are not inphase, and have a professor level of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT person.p_id FROM person
JOIN taughtby ON person.p_id = taughtby.p_id
WHERE person.inphase = '0' AND person.yearsinprogram = '0' AND person.professor <= 1 AND person.hasposition = 'Faculty_aff' AND person.student = 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT person.p_id
FROM person
WHERE inPhase = '0'
  AND yearsInProgram = '0'
  AND professor <= 1
  AND hasPosition = 'Faculty_aff'
  AND student = '0'
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM taughtBy WHERE taughtBy.p_id = person.p_id
  )
